translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi rất may mắn.
translations.nb: I dag er jeg skikkelig heldig.
translations.sv: Jag har verkligen tur i dag.
translations.da: I dag er jeg virkelig heldig.
translations.ja: 今日はすごく運がいい。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the finite verb 'habe'.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; selects an accusative object ('Schwein').
Temporal adverb modifying 'habe', specifying the time ('today').
Neuter noun, accusative singular; direct object of 'habe'. Bare (no article), as in the idiom 'Schwein haben' ('to be lucky').

sentences.target: Das Schwein schaut neugierig über den Zaun.
sentences.reading: /das ʃvaɪ̯n ʃaʊ̯t ˈnɔʏ̯ɡiːʁɪç ˈyːbɐ deːn tsaʊ̯n/

translations.de: Das Schwein schaut neugierig über den Zaun.
translations.ipa: /das ʃvaɪ̯n ʃaʊ̯t ˈnɔʏ̯ɡiːʁɪç ˈyːbɐ deːn tsaʊ̯n/
translations.en: The pig looks curiously over the fence.
translations.es: El cerdo mira con curiosidad por encima de la cerca.
translations.fr: Le cochon regarde par-dessus la clôture avec curiosité.
translations.it: Il maiale guarda con curiosità oltre la recinzione.
translations.ko: 돼지가 호기심 가득하게 울타리 너머를 바라본다.
translations.zh-Hans: 那头猪好奇地探头越过篱笆张望。
translations.yue: 嗰隻豬好奇咁伸頭望過圍欄。
translations.ru: Свинья с любопытством выглядывает через забор.
translations.pt: O porco olha com curiosidade por cima da cerca.
translations.vi: Con lợn tò mò nhìn qua hàng rào.
translations.ar: الخنزير ينظر بفضول من فوق السياج.
translations.nl: Het varken kijkt nieuwsgierig over het hek.
translations.hu: A disznó kíváncsian néz át a kerítésen.
translations.hi: सूअर जिज्ञासा से बाड़ के ऊपर से झाँक रहा है.
translations.el: Το γουρούνι κοιτά με περιέργεια πάνω από τον φράχτη.
translations.id: Babi itu mengintip dengan rasa ingin tahu dari atas pagar.
translations.ro: Porcul se uită curios peste gard.
translations.ja: 豚が好奇心いっぱいに柵の向こうをのぞいている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative neuter singular; determiner of the subject noun 'Schwein'.
Neuter noun, nominative singular; grammatical subject of 'schaut'.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive; modified by the manner word 'neugierig' and followed by a PP 'über den Zaun'.
Adjective used adverbially (predicative/manner), modifying the verb 'schaut' to express manner.
Preposition governing the accusative here; introduces the PP 'über den Zaun' indicating direction/view across something.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; agrees with 'Zaun' as object of the preposition 'über'.
Masculine noun, accusative singular; object of the preposition 'über'.

sentences.target: Im Zoo sucht Tim das Schwein.

translations.de: Im Zoo sucht Tim das Schwein.
translations.en: At the zoo, Tim is looking for the pig.
translations.es: En el zoológico, Tim busca al cerdo.
translations.fr: Au zoo, Tim cherche le cochon.
translations.it: Allo zoo, Tim cerca il maiale.
translations.zh-Hans: 在动物园，蒂姆正在找那头猪。
translations.yue: 喺動物園，Tim 喺搵嗰隻豬。
translations.pt: No zoológico, Tim está procurando o porco.
translations.he: בגן החיות טים מחפש את החזיר.
translations.vi: Ở sở thú, Tim đang tìm con lợn.
translations.ar: في حديقة الحيوان، تيم يبحث عن الخنزير.
translations.nl: In de dierentuin zoekt Tim het varken.
translations.hu: Az állatkertben Tim a disznót keresi.
translations.hi: चिड़ियाघर में टिम सूअर को ढूँढ रहा है.
translations.el: Στον ζωολογικό κήπο, ο Τιμ ψάχνει το γουρούνι.
translations.nb: I dyreparken leter Tim etter grisen.
translations.id: Di kebun binatang, Tim sedang mencari babi.
translations.sv: På djurparken letar Tim efter grisen.
translations.ro: La grădina zoologică, Tim caută porcul.
translations.da: I zoologisk have leder Tim efter grisen.
translations.ja: 動物園でティムは豚を探している。

tokens.explanation: Preposition as a contraction of 'in dem'; introduces a dative locative phrase ('in the zoo') and governs 'Zoo' in dative.
Masculine noun, dative singular; object of the prepositional contraction 'im' (locative setting).
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive verb selecting an accusative object ('das Schwein').
Proper noun (personal name), nominative singular; subject of 'sucht'.
Definite article, accusative neuter singular; determiner of 'Schwein' as direct object.
Neuter noun, accusative singular; direct object of 'sucht'.

sentences.target: Sie streichelt das kleine Schwein vorsichtig.

translations.de: Sie streichelt das kleine Schwein vorsichtig.
translations.en: She gently pets the little pig.
translations.vi: Cô ấy nhẹ nhàng vuốt ve chú lợn con.
translations.ar: هي تربت على الخنزير الصغير بلطف.
translations.hi: वह छोटे सूअर को हल्के से सहलाती है.
translations.el: Αυτή χαϊδεύει απαλά το μικρό γουρουνάκι.
translations.nb: Hun klapper forsiktig den lille grisen.
translations.id: Dia mengelus anak babi itu dengan lembut.
translations.sv: Hon klappar försiktigt den lilla grisen.
translations.da: Hun klapper forsigtigt den lille gris.
translations.ja: 彼女は子豚をやさしくなでている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, nominative singular (feminine); subject of 'streichelt'.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive verb taking a direct object ('das kleine Schwein').
Definite article, accusative neuter singular; determiner of 'Schwein' as direct object.
Adjective, attributive, accusative neuter singular; modifies 'Schwein' and agrees in case, number, and gender.
Neuter noun, accusative singular; direct object of 'streichelt'.
Adjective used adverbially (manner), modifying the verb 'streichelt' to indicate careful action.
